channel.title: LLM Timeline — TII Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from TII.

item.title: Falcon-H1R (TII)
item.description: Parameters: 7B License: open Type: model Base model: Falcon-H1 (May/2025). Announce: https://huggingface.co/blog/tiiuae/falcon-h1r-7b

item.title: Falcon-H1 (TII)
item.description: Parameters: 34B License: open Type: model "hybrid architecture that combines the strengths of the classical Transformer-based attention mechanism with the State Space Model (SSM), known for its superior long-context memory and computational efficiency."

item.title: Falcon-Edge (TII)
item.description: Parameters: 3B License: open Type: model "Falcon-Edge series - a collection of powerful, universal, and fine-tunable language models available in ternary format, based on the BitNet architecture."

item.title: Falcon 3 (TII)
item.description: Parameters: 10B License: open Type: model "We conducted a single large-scale pretraining run on the 7B model, using 1024 H100 GPU chips, leveraging 14 trillion tokens... upscaled the 7B model to a 10B parameters model by duplicating the redundant layers and continuing pre-training with 2 trillion tokens of high-quality data."

item.title: Falcon 2 11B (TII)
item.description: Parameters: 11B License: open Type: model Announce: https://www.tii.ae/news/falcon-2-uaes-technology-innovation-institute-releases-new-ai-model-series-outperforming-metas

item.title: Falcon 180B (TII)
item.description: Parameters: 180B License: open Type: model Major milestone for open source models (largest open dense model to date).

item.title: Falcon (TII)
item.description: Parameters: 40B License: open Type: model Abu Dhabi

item.title: NOOR (TII)
item.description: Parameters: 10B License: closed Type: model Arabic. "World’s largest high-quality cross-domain Arabic dataset, combining web data with books, poetry, news articles, and technical information"
